English | Azərbaycanca

Lesson 9 - Time, Days & Simple Routines

Talk about your daily routine

Goal

Talk about your daily routine.

Content

1) Days of the Week

Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday

2) Day Parts

morning / afternoon / evening

3) Routine Patterns

I wake up... I go to work...

Practice

3-Sentence Routine

Say your daily routine in 3 sentences.

Sentence Building

Build one routine sentence

Type one action and one day part.

I _____ in the _____.

Lesson Complete

Say your routine clearly using day and time words.

Back to Lesson 8 Next: Lesson 10 Back to A0 Course
